snippet.title: Zack Tabudlo - Binibini (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen to Zack Tabudlo's "Binibini" out now - http://zacktabudlo.lnk.to/Binibini

Got your own "Isayaw Mo Ako..." moment? Share those kilig experiences now: https://zacktabudlo.lnk.to/TikTok_Binibini
---
Lyrics

Alam mo ba kung pano nahulog sayo 
Naramdaman lang bigla ng puso 
Aking sinta ikaw lang nagparamdam nito 
Kaya sabihin mo sakin 

Ang tumatakbo sa isip mo 
Kung mahal mo na rin ba ako 

Isayaw mo ako 
Sa gitna ng ulan 
Mahal ko 
Kapalit man nito'y buhay ko 
Gagawin ang lahat para sayo 
Alam kong mahal mo na rin ako 

Binibini 
Sabi mo noon sakin 
Ayaw mo pa 
Pero ang yakap ngayo'y kakaiba 

Hindi ka ba nalilito 
Totoo na bang gusto ako 
Wag ng labanan ang puso 

Alam kong mahal mo na ko 
Kung ganon halika na't wag lumayo 

Isayaw mo ako 
Sa gitna ng ulan 
Mahal ko 
Kapalit man nito'y buhay ko 
Gagawin ang lahat para sayo 
Alam kong mahal mo na rin ako oh 

(Interlude) 

Isayaw mo ako 
Sa gitna ng ulan 
Mahal ko 
Kapalit man nito'y buhay ko 
Gagawin ang lahat para sayo 
Alam kong mahal mo na rin ako oh

snippet.title: LAKERS at NETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | April 10, 2021
snippet.description:
LAKERS at NETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | April 10, 2021

The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Brooklyn Nets, 126-101. Andre Drummond led the Lakers with 20 PTS and 11 REB, while Dennis Schroder added 19 PTS and 4 AST in the victory. Kevin Durant tallied 22 PTS, 7 REB and 5 AST for the Nets in the losing effort. The Lakers improve to 33-20 on the season, while the Nets fall to 36-17.

Next Games:
Los Angeles Lakers at New York Knicks - Apr. 12 at 7:30pm/et on ESPN
Brooklyn Nets at Minnesota Timberwolves - Apr. 12 at 8pm/et on NBA League Pass

snippet.title: Anyare sa Laro na Ito?
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Pinsan at Staff ni Pambansang Kamao, pina-TULFO sa Pambansang Sumbungan (BITAG)!
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE: https://bit.ly/2pzg3IJ

DAHIL LAMANG SA SABON! PAMBANSANG KAMAO sa PAMBANSANG SUMBUNGAN!

P2-milyong piso ang hinahabol ng pobreng nagrereklamo. May dalawang taon na raw siyang tinataguan at 'di kinakausap ng mga umano'y staff at pinsan ni Senator Pacman.

Sinubukan na rin daw niyang pumunta sa Senado para makausap ng personal ang mga 'to pero tinengga lang daw siya't 'di hinarap.

Panoorin ang katwiran ng staff na katransaksiyon ng nagrereklamo!

Twitter: https://twitter.com/bitagbentulfo

snippet.description:

Official Lyrics:
 
ThereвАЩs something вАШbout the way 
The street looks when itвАЩs just rained 
ThereвАЩs a glow off the pavement 
You walk me to the car 
And you know I want to ask you to dance right there 
In the middle of the parking lot, yeah 
Oh, yeah 

WeвАЩre driving down the road 
I wonder if you know 
IвАЩm trying so hard not to get caught up now 
But youвАЩre just so cool, run your hands through your hair 
Absentmindedly makinвАЩ me want you 

And I donвАЩt know how it gets better than this 
You take my hand and drag me headfirst 
Fearless 
And I donвАЩt know why but with you IвАЩd dance 
In a storm in my best dress 
Fearless 

So baby drive slow till we run out of road 
In this one-horse town, I wanna stay right here 
In this passenger seat 
You put your eyes on me In this moment now 
Capture it, remember it 

Repeat chorus 
Oh, oh 

Well you stood there with me in the doorway 
My hands shake, IвАЩm not usually this way but 
You pull me in and IвАЩm a little more brave 
ItвАЩs a first kiss, itвАЩs flawless, really something 
ItвАЩs fearless 
Oh, yeah 

Repeat chorus 
Repeat chorus
 
Oh, oh 
Oh, yeah

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay

Everything was right
Mr. IвАЩve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart

Hello, Mr. casually cruel

IвАЩve been Miss misery since your goodbye

And I never got past what you put me through

So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat

Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвАЩs really such a shame
ItвАЩs such a shame

Now IвАЩm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвАЩll miss me
But by then youвАЩll be Mr. too late

IвАЩve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвАЩre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвАЩre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

snippet.description: Talking to Baron made me reflect on my own life, the truth is, we all have done things in the past we are not proud of and we wouldnвАЩt want to see in the headlines. snippet.title: Police officer fired for pepper-spraying Black and Latino lieutenant during traffic stop
snippet.description:
Bodycam and cellphone video shows how a Virginia officer pepper-sprayed a Black and Latino Army lieutenant during a traffic stop in December. Christina Ruffini reports on the details of the stop and the lawsuit against the officers.

snippet.title: SIQUIJOR MYSTICS permanently Banned from PILIPINAS VISMIN SUPER CUP
snippet.description:
#TambayAvenue #KaTambay #PilipinasVisMinSupercup
Pilipinas VISMIN Super Cup April 13, 2021
VISMIN Super Cup live
vismin cup 2021
Lapu-lapu vs Siquijor game fixing?
The following Lapu Lapu City players have been suspended for the rest of the first round and fined P15,000: Jercules Tangcay, Reed Juntilla, Monbert Arong, Dawn Ochea, and Ferdinand Lusdoc.
Rendell Senining -- the player who switched hands at the free throw line -- is suspended for the rest of the tournament and fined P15,000. 

The Siquijor players who are now banished from the league are: Joshua Alcober, Ryan Buenafe, Vincent Tangcay, Jan Penaflor, Gene Bellaza, Michael Calomot, Frederick Rodriguez, Jopet Quiro, Isagani Gooc, Miguel Castellano, Juan Aspiras, Peter Buenafe, and Michael Sereno.
tags: vismin super cup full game highlights

snippet.description:
вЩЂ Bruno Mars - Talking To The Moon
Stream/Download: 

вАҐ Bruno Mars вАҐ 
вАҐ http://www.brunomars.comвАЛвАЛвАЛ 
вАҐ http://www.instagram.com/brunomarsвАЛвАЛвАЛ

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
I know you're somewhere
Out there
Somewhere far away
I want you back
I want you back
My neighbors think I'm crazy
But they don't understand
You're all I had
You're all I had

[Pre-chorus]
At night when the stars
Light up my room
I sit by myself
[Chorus]
Talking to the moon
TryвАЩna get to you
In hopes you're on the
Other side
Talking to me too
Or am I a fool
Who sits alone
Talking to the moon

snippet.title: China sends warplanes into Taiwan's air defense zone, Taipei says
snippet.description:
China sent 25 warplanes into Taiwan's air defense identification zone on Monday, the largest breach of that space since the island began regularly reporting such activity in September, Taiwan's Defense Ministry said.
The Chinese flights came a day after the US secretary of state warned Beijing that Washington was committed to the defense of the democratic, self-governed island, which China considers part of its sovereign territory.
The 25 planes dispatched by China's People's Liberation Army (PLA) forces included 14 J-16 fighter jets, four J-10 fighter jets, four H-6K bombers, two anti-submarine warfare planes and an airborne early warning and control plane, according to Taiwan's Defense Ministry.

#DavidCulver #CNNinternational #NewDay

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack SnyderвАЩs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero whoвАЩs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), itвАЩs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thingвАЩs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh√ґfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra√Їl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

Official Lyrics:
 
YouвАЩre on the phone with your girlfriend 
SheвАЩs upset, sheвАЩs going off about something that you said 
Cause she doesnвАЩt get your humor like I do 

IвАЩm in my room itвАЩs a typical Tuesday night
IвАЩm listening to the kind of music she doesnвАЩt like 
And sheвАЩll never know your story like I do 

Cause she wears short skirts, I wear t-shirts 
SheвАЩs cheer captain and IвАЩm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вАШbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвАЩre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me
 You belong with me 

Walk in the streets with you in your worn out jeans 
I canвАЩt help thinking this is how it ought to be 
Laughing on a park bench thinking to myself, hey isnвАЩt this easy 

And youвАЩve got a smile that could light up this whole town 
I havenвАЩt seen it in a while since she brought you down 
You say youвАЩre fine I know you better than that 
Hey what you doing with a girl like that 

She wears high heels, I wear sneakers 
SheвАЩs cheer captain and IвАЩm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вАШbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвАЩre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 

Oh I remember you driving to my house in the middle of the night 
IвАЩm the one who makes you laugh when you know youвАЩre вАШbout to cry 
I know your favorite songs and you tell me about your dreams 
I think I know where you belong, I think I know itвАЩs with me 

CanвАЩt you see that IвАЩm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвАЩt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
Have you ever thought just maybe 
You belong with me 
You belong with me

snippet.title: Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho: 6-ANYOS NA BATA, MAHIGIT 70 KILOGRAMS NA ANG TIMBANG
snippet.description:

CONTACT NUMBER: 09551750418

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her householdвАЩs most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular вАУ a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing вАЬappropriateвАЭ engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the QueenвАЩs deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Game Recap: Lakers 126, Nets 101
snippet.description: The Lakers defeated the Nets, 126-101. Andre Drummond led the Lakers with 20 points and 11 rebounds, while Dennis Schroder added 19 points and four assists in the victory. Kevin Durant tallied 22 points, seven rebounds and five assists for the Nets in the losing effort. The Lakers improve to 33-20 on the season, while the Nets fall to 36-17.

snippet.title: ISA NA NAMAN ANG PUMANAW NA CURFEW VIOLATOR!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 17 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Magpakailanman: Quenching my brother-in-law's thirst | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Born like two birds of a feather, sisters April (Kim Rodriguez) and May (Faith Da Silva) have always got each other's backs ever since. However, as the two sisters get married to their partners, they will both get tangled up by the man they truly love. What could April possibly do when she finds out that her husband, Edong (Ervic Vijandre) engages in an affair with his own sister-in-law?

Watch episodes of 'Magpakailanman' every Saturday at 8:50 PM on GMA Network, hosted by Ms. Mel Tiangco. This episode, "Huwag Ate, Huwag Bayaw," stars Kim Rodriguez, Faith Da Silva, Rodjun Cruz, Ervic Vijandre, Lovely Rivero, Mike Lloren, Rein Adriano, and Kim Belles. #Magpakailanman #MPKFullEpisode

snippet.title: Prince Philip dies: Queen faces a future without her вАШstrength and stayвАЩ | ITV News
snippet.description:
After over 70 years with him by her side, Queen Elizabeth must now face a future without Philip, the man she once honoured as her "strength and stay", the longest serving royal consort in British history.вАѓ 

Elizabeth II has become the first reigning widow monarch since Queen Victoria, who was so devastated by the death of Prince Albert, she withdrew almost entirely from public life for 40 years and become known as the вАШWidow of WindsorвАЩ.

snippet.title: Ako Naman Muna - Angela Ken (Music Video)
snippet.description:
Trigger Warning: This content may contain video clip references to topics such as self-harm and violence which others might find disturbing. Please engage in self-care as you watch this video.
 
If you or someone you know needs help, contact the National Center for Mental Health through the ff.:

вЦ™ 1553 (Luzon-wide landline toll-free)

GLOBE / TM Subscribers
вЦ™ 0917-899-8727
вЦ™ 0966-351-4518

SMART / SUN / TNT Subscribers
вЦ™ 0908-639-2672

Sundan sila sa Twitter (twitter.com/ncmhhotline) at Facebook (facebook.com/ncmhcrisishotline) para sa iba pang impormasyon.

The NCMH crisis hotline is a 24-hour service meant to respond to mental health-related queries. It connects the public to mental health professionals to provide the necessary counseling and proper triaging to those who are in crisis.

Ako Naman Muna
Words and Music by: Angela Ken 
Performed by: Angela Ken 
Mixed and Mastered by: Tim Recla  
Produced by: Jonathan Manalo

Out Now on all digital music stores and platforms 

TikTok Sound Page: https://vt.tiktok.com/ZSJ2Pc76G/вАЛ

Listen here: https://backl.ink/144559806вАЛ

Watch the official lyric video visualizer on Star Music Youtube channel - https://youtu.be/1vzg7-tsV40вАЛ

Production: YouMeUs MNL
Director: Amiel Kirby Balagtas
Writer: Edgar Dale Reci√±a 
Storyboard: Donna Rey
DOP, Offline and Online Editor, Colourist: Jonathan Penarejo
Second camera: Sadam Tejol
Prod Head: Xavier Alfonso

Star Music Digital Production Team
Digital Content Producer: Jaliza Baluyut
Graphics and Cover Art: Andrew Castillo
Digital Support Specialist: Ice Almazan
Digital Content Publisher: Jam Esquillo
Head, Digital Content Production: William The Invincible Garcia

ADProm Specialist: Iaan Cajocson
Social Media Specialist: Naomi Enriquez 

Published by Star Songs 
Head, Star Songs and New Media: Atty Marivic Benedicto 
Digital Publisher: Jam Esquillo

Executive Producer Roxy Liquigan


Lyrics:

(Verse 1)
Kada hakbang sa lupaвАЩy para akong inaalon
at nalulunod sa batikos ng mundo,
sa kung ano lamang ang kaya ko.

Pigang-piga na sa mga problemang вАШdi masolusyonan agad.
Parang wala ng bukas,
pwede bang umiwas?
Hinahanap ang sarili ngunit вАШdi na kakayanin sa ligaw na dinadaanan ko.
вАШSan na вАШto patungo?
вАШSan na вАШko patungo?

(CHORUS)
Dahan-dahan nating simulan muli ang pag-hakbang.
Dahan-dahang tumingin sa salamin upang makita ang ating kagandahan. 
Dahan-dahang iangat ang mukha upang masilayan ang payapang kalangitan.
Oo, pagod ka na. 
Pero вАШdi ka nag-iisa. 
KayaвАЩt lumaban ka. 
At sabihing,
вАЬAko naman munaвАЭ.

(Verse 2)
Kada langhap sa hangin pansin ko na lagi nalang usok.
Walang malinis halos puro polusyon,
parang ako raw na konsumisyon. 
Gulong-gulo ang isip вАШsan ba lulugar kapag nag-kamali. 
Grabe sila manghusga,
bakit perpekto ba sila?

Huminga ka ng malalim at isipin ng mabuti
ang mga desisyong ilalaan para sa kinabukasan.
Nang makapunta sa
paroroonan.. Kung

(CHORUS)
Dahan-dahan nating simulan muli ang pag-hakbang.
Dahan-dahang tumingin sa salamin upang makita ang ating kagandahan. 
Dahan-dahang iangat ang mukha upang masilayan ang payapang kalangitan.
Oo, pagod ka na. 
Pero вАШdi ka nag-iisa. 
KayaвАЩt lumaban ka. 
At sabihing,
вАЬAko naman munaвАЭ.

(Bridge)
Huwag papalamon sa lungkot l,
huwag hahayaang malugmok 
ang puso mo sa ibabato saвАЩyo ng iba. 
Tandaan mong sapat ka...

Dahan-dahang tanggalin ang maskara at hayaang tumulo ang bumabadyang mga luha. 
Dahan-dahang iangat ang mukha upang masilayan ang mga taong ikaвАЩy pinapahalagahan. 
Oo, pagod ka na. 
Pero вАШdi ka nag-iisa.
KayaвАЩt lumaban ka. 
At sabihing, 
вАЬAko naman munaвАЭ.

snippet.title: ANG NAKAKANGINIG NA MAYOR!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 17 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of вАШMrs Sri LankaвАЩ in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning вАЬMrs WorldвАЭ on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new вАЬMrs Sri LankaвАЭ. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube вЦЇ http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared вАЬMrs Sri Lanka 2020вАЭ during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were вАЬdeeply disturbed and sincerely regretвАЭ the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

вАШMrs WorldвАЩ arrested for grabbing crown from head of вАШMrs Sri LankaвАЩ вЦЇ https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today вЦЇ https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: VIRAL VIDEO NG BATANG KUMAKAIN NG UOD!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 17 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.description:

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.

snippet.title: Tensions rise as Beijing steps up military presence in South China Sea
snippet.description:
Tensions are rising in the South China Sea as Beijing steps up its military presence in disputed waters. The New York Times' Beijing bureau chief Steven Lee Myers joins CBSN's "Red & Blue" anchor Elaine Quijano with more on how the need for vaccines is complicating the response from other nations in the region, and how the U.S. could become involved.

CBSN is CBS NewsвАЩ 24/7 digital streaming news service featuring live, anchored coverage available for free across all platforms. Launched in November 2014, the service is a premier destination for breaking news and original storytelling from the deep bench of CBS News correspondents and reporters. CBSN features the top stories of the day as well as deep dives into key issues facing the nation and the world. CBSN has also expanded to launch local news streaming services in major markets across the country. CBSN is currently available on CBSNews.com and the CBS News app across more than 20 platforms, as well as the Paramount+ subscription service.

snippet.title: THE 8 'лВШлЮАнЮИ (Side By Side) (Korean Ver.)' Official MV
snippet.description:
THE 8 'лВШлЮАнЮИ (Side By Side) (Korean Ver.)' Official MV

лФФмЧРмЮЗмЭШ мЭіл≤И лФФмІАнДЄ мЛ±кЄА вАШSide By SideвАЩлКФ вАШFalling DownвАЩ мЭінЫД мХљ 1лЕД лІМмЧР к≥µк∞ЬнХШлКФ мЖФл°Ь к≥°мЬЉл°Ь мШ§лЮЂлПЩмХИ кЄ∞лЛ§л†§м§А нМђлУ§мЭД мЬДнХі м§Скµ≠мЦі лњРлІМ мХДлЛИлЭЉ нХЬкµ≠мЦікєМмІА 2к∞АмІА л≤Дм†ДмЭД мД†л≥імЭіл©∞ лФФмЧРмЮЗлІМмЭШ к∞Рк∞Бм†БмЭЄ к∞РмД±к≥Љ нХЬмЄµ лНФ мД±мЮ•нХЬ мХДнЛ∞мК§нКЄмЭШ л©іл™®л•Љ лЛімХДлГИлЛ§. 

вАШлВШлЮАнЮИвАЩлКФ мҐЛмХДнХШлКФ мГБлМАк∞А лВі лІИмЭМмЭД л™∞лЭЉм§ШмДЬ мДЬмЪінХЬ к∞Рм†ХмЭД мН® лВіл†§ к∞Д мВђлЮСмК§лЯђмЪі к≥°мЬЉл°Ь к∞РмД±м†БмЭЄ кЄ∞нГА мљФлУЬ мЧ∞м£ЉмЩА лѓЄлЛИл©АнХШмІАлІМ кљЙ м∞ђ лУЬлЯЉ, л≤†мЭімК§мЩА нФМлЯ≠ мВђмЪілУЬ мЧ∞м£Љк∞А к≥°мЭШ мЮђлѓЄл•Љ лНФнХЬлЛ§. м§СлПЕмД± мЮИлКФ л©Ьл°ЬлФФмЧР лЛ®мИЬнХШмІАлІМ кЄ∞мЦµмЧР лВ®лКФ нНЉнПђл®ЉмК§к∞А нКєнЮИлВШ мЭЄмГБм†БмЭілЛ§. нКєнЮИ лФФмЧРмЮЗмЭА мЭіл≤И лЕЄлЮШмЧРлПД мІБм†С мЮСмВђ, мЮСк≥°мЧР м∞ЄмЧђнХі к≥°мЭШ мЩДмД±лПДл•Љ лЖТмШАлЛ§. лЃ§мІБлєДлФФмШ§мЧРмДЬлПД вАШмВђлЮСмЧР лє†мІД лВ®мЮРвАЩл•Љ мЩДл≤љнХШк≤М мЖМнЩФнХілВіл©∞ вАШкЄАл°Ьл≤М лІМлК• мЧФнД∞нЕМмЭілДИвАЩмЭШ мЮЕмІАл•Љ лЛ®лЛ®нЮИ кµ≥нШФлЛ§.

The latest single вАЬSide By SideвАЭ by THE 8вАЩs is the artistвАЩs first solo track since the release of вАЬFalling DownвАЭ a year ago and showcases THE 8вАЩs unique sentimentality and his growth as an artist, offered in two versions (Chinese and Korean) as a special gift to long-awaiting fans.  

Sung as a tale of wistful feelings from love thatвАЩs not returned, вАЬSide By SideвАЭ is filled with loving emotions as well as delicate guitar chords, minimal yet supple drums and bass, and delightful pluck sounds that add fun to the music. An addictive melody and a simple but memorable performance make the song a stand-out, and THE 8вАЩs personal contributions to the melody and lyrics make the song even more complete. His portrayal of a man fallen in love in the music video makes it clear once again why he is indeed a global all-around entertainer.  

#THE8 #лФФмЧРмЮЗ
#Side_By_Side #лВШлЮАнЮИ

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItвАЩs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItвАЩs a vicious cycle.

ўАўАўАўАўА
DW Documentary gives you knowledge beyond the headlines. Watch top documentaries from German broadcasters and international production companies. Meet intriguing people, travel to distant lands, get a look behind the complexities of daily life and build a deeper understanding of current affairs and global events. snippet.title: Prince Philip has died aged 99 @BBC News live рЯФі BBC
snippet.description:
Subscribe and рЯФФ to OFFICIAL BBC YouTube рЯСЙ https://bit.ly/2IXqEIn
Stream original BBC programmes FIRST on BBC iPlayer рЯСЙ https://bbc.in/2J18jYJ

Prince Philip, Queen Elizabeth II's husband, has died aged 99, Buckingham Palace has announced.

The prince married Princess Elizabeth in 1947, five years before she became Queen, and was the longest-serving royal consort in British history.

A statement from Buckingham Palace said: "It is with deep sorrow that Her Majesty The Queen has announced the death of her beloved husband, His Royal Highness The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh.

"His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle."

Follow the story рЯСЙ https://bbc.in/3fYe0J5

**This film is under non-exclusive license from ITN Distribution. All rights reserved**

Year Released : 2017
Director: Ethan Wiley
Writers: Chris Walas (co-writer) | Ethan Wiley (co-writer)
Stars: Sasha Jackson | Douglas Tait | Erroll Shand

After a small airplane crash lands in a remote area of Central China, several passengers survive, including a Chinese boy and his American guardian. As they wait to be rescued, they soon encounter the mysterious Yeren-- an elusive ape-man creature rumored to have inhabited the Shennongjia mountains for many centuries. When ruthless poachers arrive to capture the Yeren, our heroes must decide if the unique creature is their friend or foe.

snippet.description:
LAKERS at HEAT | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | April 8, 2021

The Miami Heat defeated the Los Angeles Lakers, 110-104. Jimmy Butler led the Heat with 28 PTS, 7 REB, 5 AST and 3 STL, while Victor Oladipo added 18 PTS and 3 STL. Kentavious Caldwell-Pope put up a season-high 28 PTS for the Lakers, while Andre Drummond contributed 15 PTS, 12 REB and 2 STL.
